title: Policy file
description: Maintainer-authored file (agent-done.json) that defines what a passing 'done' requires. Located at <repo-root>/agent-done.json (git rev-parse --show-toplevel, fallback: cwd). Overridable with AGENT_DONE_POLICY env var or --policy CLI flag.

required.description: Ordered list of checks that must each have a fresh passing receipt before the gate passes.

items.description: A single required check. Each object MUST be flat (no nested braces) to allow dependency-free line-oriented parsing across all engines.

label.description: Name of the required receipt label, e.g. "test" or "build".

command_regex.description: Optional ECMAScript / POSIX ERE pattern matched against the receipt's command field. When absent, any command is accepted. MUST NOT contain a literal double-quote character (") — use alternation or character classes instead. This constraint enables dependency-free parsing with a simple regex across all engines.

ttl.description: Maximum age in seconds for a receipt to be considered fresh. Omit to use the engine default (AGENT_DONE_TTL env var, or 3600). A value of 0 disables the freshness check.
